Ice_Log: They spent the entire time in the Alaskan Panhandle. A few bits of ice seen, I suspect it was from glaciers.
They passed fields of floating ice from Glacier Bay around 7 A.M. I'm considering this to be glacial ice.
At 6 P.M. passed through large fields of floating ice off eastern end Lemesurier Island. Note: I am considering this to be glacial ice.
2:35 to 3:10 stopped for ice. 3:10 stood into Point Frederick. 2:50 anchored off Hooniah.
